Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents With Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant David Reuter and Usa Hostels, Inc.'s motion to compel production of documents (set #2) is granted. The Court will exercise its discretion and not consider the late-filed opposition. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $440 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
